items.title: CBD may slow Alzheimer’s by calming the brain’s immune system
items.summary: CBD may be doing far more than just easing pain or anxiety — new research suggests it could help fight Alzheimer’s disease by calming the brain’s runaway immune response. items.title: 'I forgot what it's like to be outside': Intensive care ward opens on rooftop
